title: Can we use monday.com logo on the website of our app next to our app name?
excerpt: we are creating a product website for our app that we intend to publish on the marketplace. can we use the monday.com logo next to our app name on the website or should we be using our app icon?

posts.author: morpheus (morpheus)
posts.cookedHtml: we are creating a product website for our app that we intend to publish on the marketplace. can we use the monday.com logo next to our app name on the website or should we be using our app icon?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Look at other marketplace vendors and see what they have done.
